manga.title: The Delivery Rider
manga.description:
A new town, a place of new beginnings... and as one of the very few delivery riders, I'll make sure it's worth my while. *(Source: Toomics)*

**Original Webtoon:**     
[Toomics](https://www.toomics.com/uplmscg/episode/toon/7146), [Lezhin](https://www.lezhin.com/ko/comic/newtown_delivery_driver), [MrBlue](https://www.mrblue.com/comic/C000067943)
